html:
Fact Symbols with Injective Instances


None


Multiset Rewriting Rules


rule (modulo AC) isend:
   [ !KU( x ) ] --[ K( x ) ]-> [ In( x ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */


rule (modulo AC) irecv:
   [ Out( x ) ] --> [ !KD( x ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */


rule (modulo E) Init[color=#ffffff, process="!",
                     issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ ] --[ Init( ) ]-> [ State_( ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) p_0_[color=#ffffff, process="!",
                     issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_( ) ] --> [ !Semistate_1( ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) p_1_[color=#ffffff, process="!",
                     issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ !Semistate_1( ) ] --> [ State_1( ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) p_0_1[color=#ffffff, process="|",
                      issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_1( ) ] --> [ State_11( ), State_12( ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) p_0_11[color=#ffffff, process="|",
                       issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_11( ) ] --> [ State_111( ), State_112( ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) p_0_111[color=#ffffff, process="|",
                        issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_111( ) ] --> [ State_1111( ), State_1112( ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) newh_0_1111[color=#ffffff,
                            process="new h.1;", issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_1111( ), Fr( h.1 ) ] --> [ State_11111( h.1 ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) newh_0_1111[color=#ffffff,
                               process="new h.1;", issapicrule, role='Process']:
     [ State_1111( ), Fr( h ) ] --> [ State_11111( h ) ]
  */
rule (modulo E) newk_0_11111[color=#ffffff,
                             process="new k.1;", issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_11111( h.1 ), Fr( k.1 ) ]
  -->
   [ State_111111( h.1, k.1 ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) newk_0_11111[color=#ffffff,
                                process="new k.1;", issapicrule, role='Process']:
     [ State_11111( h ), Fr( k ) ] --> [ State_111111( h, k ) ]
  */
rule (modulo E) eventNewKeyhk_0_111111[color=#ffffff,
                                       process="event NewKey( h.1, k.1 );", issapicrule,
                                       role='Process']:
   [ State_111111( h.1, k.1 ) ]
  --[ NewKey( h.1, k.1 ) ]->
   [ State_1111111( h.1, k.1 ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) eventNewKeyhk_0_111111[color=#ffffff,
                                          process="event NewKey( h.1, k.1 );",
                                          issapicrule, role='Process']:
     [ State_111111( h, k ) ]
    --[ NewKey( h, k ) ]->
     [ State_1111111( h, k ) ]
  */
rule (modulo E) insertkeyhk_0_1111111[color=#ffffff,
                                      process="insert <'key', h.1>,k.1;",
                                      issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_1111111( h.1, k.1 ) ]
  --[ Insert( <'key', h.1>, k.1 ) ]->
   [ State_11111111( h.1, k.1 ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) insertkeyhk_0_1111111[color=#ffffff,
                                         process="insert <'key', h.1>,k.1;",
                                         issapicrule, role='Process']:
     [ State_1111111( h, k ) ]
    --[ Insert( <'key', h>, k ) ]->
     [ State_11111111( h, k ) ]
  */
rule (modulo E) insertatthdec_0_11111111[color=#ffffff,
                                         process="insert <'att', h.1>,'dec';",
                                         issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_11111111( h.1, k.1 ) ]
  --[ Insert( <'att', h.1>, 'dec' ) ]->
   [ State_111111111( h.1, k.1 ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) insertatthdec_0_11111111[color=#ffffff,
                                            process="insert <'att', h.1>,'dec';",
                                            issapicrule, role='Process']:
     [ State_11111111( h, k ) ]
    --[ Insert( <'att', h>, 'dec' ) ]->
     [ State_111111111( h, k ) ]
  */
rule (modulo E) outh_0_111111111[color=#ffffff,
                                 process="out(h.1);", issapicrule,
                                 role='Process']:
   [ State_111111111( h.1, k.1 ) ]
  -->
   [ State_1111111111( h.1, k.1 ), Out( h.1 ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) outh_0_111111111[color=#ffffff,
                                    process="out(h.1);", issapicrule,
                                    role='Process']:
     [ State_111111111( h, k ) ]
    -->
     [ State_1111111111( h, k ), Out( h ) ]
  */
rule (modulo E) p_0_1111111111[color=#ffffff,
                               process="0", issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_1111111111( h.1, k.1 ) ] --> [ ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) p_0_1111111111[color=#ffffff,
                                  process="0", issapicrule, role='Process']:
     [ State_1111111111( h, k ) ] --> [ ]
  */
rule (modulo E) inh_0_1112[color=#ffffff,
                           process="in(h.2);", issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_1112( ), In( h.2 ) ] --> [ State_11121( h.2 ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) inh_0_1112[color=#ffffff,
                              process="in(h.2);", issapicrule, role='Process']:
     [ State_1112( ), In( h ) ] --> [ State_11121( h ) ]
  */
rule (modulo E) lockh_0_11121[color=#ffffff,
                              process="lock h.2;", issapicrule,
                              role='Process']:
   [ State_11121( h.2 ), Fr( lock ) ]
  --[
  Lock_0( '0', lock, h.2 ), Lock( '0', lock, h.2 )
  ]->
   [ State_111211( lock, h.2 ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) lockh_0_11121[color=#ffffff,
                                 process="lock h.2;", issapicrule,
                                 role='Process']:
     [ State_11121( h ), Fr( lock ) ]
    --[ Lock_0( '0', lock, h ), Lock( '0', lock, h )
    ]->
     [ State_111211( lock, h ) ]
  */
rule (modulo E) insertatthwrap_0_111211[color=#ffffff,
                                        process="insert <'att', h.2>,'wrap';",
                                        issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_111211( lock, h.2 ) ]
  --[ Insert( <'att', h.2>, 'wrap' ) ]->
   [ State_1112111( lock, h.2 ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) insertatthwrap_0_111211[color=#ffffff,
                                           process="insert <'att', h.2>,'wrap';",
                                           issapicrule, role='Process']:
     [ State_111211( lock, h ) ]
    --[ Insert( <'att', h>, 'wrap' ) ]->
     [ State_1112111( lock, h ) ]
  */
rule (modulo E) unlockh_0_1112111[color=#ffffff,
                                  process="unlock h.2;", issapicrule,
                                  role='Process']:
   [ State_1112111( lock, h.2 ) ]
  --[
  Unlock_0( '0', lock, h.2 ),
  Unlock( '0', lock, h.2 )
  ]->
   [ State_11121111( lock, h.2 ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) unlockh_0_1112111[color=#ffffff,
                                     process="unlock h.2;", issapicrule,
                                     role='Process']:
     [ State_1112111( lock, h ) ]
    --[
    Unlock_0( '0', lock, h ), Unlock( '0', lock, h )
    ]->
     [ State_11121111( lock, h ) ]
  */
rule (modulo E) p_0_11121111[color=#ffffff, process="0",
                             issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_11121111( lock, h.2 ) ] --> [ ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) p_0_11121111[color=#ffffff, process="0",
                                issapicrule, role='Process']:
     [ State_11121111( lock, h ) ] --> [ ]
  */
rule (modulo E) inhc_0_112[color=#ffffff,
                           process="in(<h.3, c.1>);", issapicrule,
                           role='Process']:
   [ State_112( ), In( <h.3, c.1> ) ]
  -->
   [ State_1121( c.1, h.3 ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) inhc_0_112[color=#ffffff,
                              process="in(<h.3, c.1>);", issapicrule,
                              role='Process']:
     [ State_112( ), In( <h, c> ) ] --> [ State_1121( c, h ) ]
  */
rule (modulo E) lookupatthasa_0_1121[color=#ffffff,
                                     process="lookup <'att', h.3> as a.1",
                                     no_derivcheck, issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_1121( c.1, h.3 ) ]
  --[ IsIn( <'att', h.3>, a.1 ) ]->
   [ State_11211( a.1, c.1, h.3 ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) lookupatthasa_0_1121[color=#ffffff,
                                        process="lookup <'att', h.3> as a.1",
                                        no_derivcheck, issapicrule, role='Process']:
     [ State_1121( c, h ) ]
    --[ IsIn( <'att', h>, a ) ]->
     [ State_11211( a, c, h ) ]
  */
rule (modulo E) lookupatthasa_1_1121[color=#ffffff,
                                     process="lookup <'att', h.3> as a.1",
                                     no_derivcheck, issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_1121( c.1, h.3 ) ]
  --[ IsNotSet( <'att', h.3> ) ]->
   [ State_11212( c.1, h.3 ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) lookupatthasa_1_1121[color=#ffffff,
                                        process="lookup <'att', h.3> as a.1",
                                        no_derivcheck, issapicrule, role='Process']:
     [ State_1121( c, h ) ]
    --[ IsNotSet( <'att', h> ) ]->
     [ State_11212( c, h ) ]
  */
rule (modulo E) ifadec_0_11211[color=#ffffff,
                               process="if a.1='dec'", issapicrule,
                               role='Process']:
   [ State_11211( a.1, c.1, h.3 ) ]
  --[ Pred_Eq( a.1, 'dec' ) ]->
   [ State_112111( a.1, c.1, h.3 ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) ifadec_0_11211[color=#ffffff,
                                  process="if a.1='dec'", issapicrule,
                                  role='Process']:
     [ State_11211( a, c, h ) ]
    --[ Pred_Eq( a, 'dec' ) ]->
     [ State_112111( a, c, h ) ]
  */
rule (modulo E) ifadec_1_11211[color=#ffffff,
                               process="if a.1='dec'", issapicrule,
                               role='Process']:
   [ State_11211( a.1, c.1, h.3 ) ]
  --[ Pred_Not_Eq( a.1, 'dec' ) ]->
   [ State_112112( a.1, c.1, h.3 ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) ifadec_1_11211[color=#ffffff,
                                  process="if a.1='dec'", issapicrule,
                                  role='Process']:
     [ State_11211( a, c, h ) ]
    --[ Pred_Not_Eq( a, 'dec' ) ]->
     [ State_112112( a, c, h ) ]
  */
rule (modulo E) lookupkeyhask_0_112111[color=#ffffff,
                                       process="lookup <'key', h.3> as k.2",
                                       no_derivcheck, issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_112111( a.1, c.1, h.3 ) ]
  --[ IsIn( <'key', h.3>, k.2 ) ]->
   [ State_1121111( a.1, c.1, k.2, h.3 ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) lookupkeyhask_0_112111[color=#ffffff,
                                          process="lookup <'key', h.3> as k.2",
                                          no_derivcheck, issapicrule, role='Process']:
     [ State_112111( a, c, h ) ]
    --[ IsIn( <'key', h>, k ) ]->
     [ State_1121111( a, c, k, h ) ]
  */
rule (modulo E) lookupkeyhask_1_112111[color=#ffffff,
                                       process="lookup <'key', h.3> as k.2",
                                       no_derivcheck, issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_112111( a.1, c.1, h.3 ) ]
  --[ IsNotSet( <'key', h.3> ) ]->
   [ State_1121112( a.1, c.1, h.3 ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) lookupkeyhask_1_112111[color=#ffffff,
                                          process="lookup <'key', h.3> as k.2",
                                          no_derivcheck, issapicrule, role='Process']:
     [ State_112111( a, c, h ) ]
    --[ IsNotSet( <'key', h> ) ]->
     [ State_1121112( a, c, h ) ]
  */
rule (modulo E) eventIsTrueencSuccck_0_1121111[color=#ffffff,
                                               process="event IsTrue( encSucc(c.1, k.2) );",
                                               issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_1121111( a.1, c.1, k.2, h.3 ) ]
  --[ IsTrue( encSucc(c.1, k.2) ) ]->
   [ State_11211111( a.1, c.1, k.2, h.3 ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) eventIsTrueencSuccck_0_1121111[color=#ffffff,
                                                  process="event IsTrue( encSucc(c.1, k.2) );",
                                                  issapicrule, role='Process']:
     [ State_1121111( a, c, k, h ) ]
    --[ IsTrue( z ) ]->
     [ State_11211111( a, c, k, h ) ]
    variants (modulo AC)
    1. c = c.9
       k = k.10
       z = encSucc(c.9, k.10)
    
    2. c = senc(x.9, x.10)
       k = x.10
       z = true
  */
rule (modulo E) eventDecUsingksdecck_0_11211111[color=#ffffff,
                                                process="event DecUsing( k.2, sdec(c.1, k.2) );",
                                                issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_11211111( a.1, c.1, k.2, h.3 ) ]
  --[ DecUsing( k.2, sdec(c.1, k.2) ) ]->
   [ State_112111111( a.1, c.1, k.2, h.3 ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) eventDecUsingksdecck_0_11211111[color=#ffffff,
                                                   process="event DecUsing( k.2, sdec(c.1, k.2) );",
                                                   issapicrule, role='Process']:
     [ State_11211111( a, c, k, h ) ]
    --[ DecUsing( k, z ) ]->
     [ State_112111111( a, c, k, h ) ]
    variants (modulo AC)
    1. c = c.9
       k = k.10
       z = sdec(c.9, k.10)
    
    2. c = senc(x.9, x.10)
       k = x.10
       z = x.9
  */
rule (modulo E) outsdecck_0_112111111[color=#ffffff,
                                      process="out(sdec(c.1, k.2));", issapicrule,
                                      role='Process']:
   [ State_112111111( a.1, c.1, k.2, h.3 ) ]
  -->
   [ State_1121111111( a.1, c.1, k.2, h.3 ), Out( sdec(c.1, k.2) ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) outsdecck_0_112111111[color=#ffffff,
                                         process="out(sdec(c.1, k.2));", issapicrule,
                                         role='Process']:
     [ State_112111111( a, c, k, h ) ]
    -->
     [ State_1121111111( a, c, k, h ), Out( z ) ]
    variants (modulo AC)
    1. c = c.9
       k = k.10
       z = sdec(c.9, k.10)
    
    2. c = senc(x.9, x.10)
       k = x.10
       z = x.9
  */
rule (modulo E) p_0_1121111111[color=#ffffff,
                               process="0", issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_1121111111( a.1, c.1, k.2, h.3 ) ] --> [ ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) p_0_1121111111[color=#ffffff,
                                  process="0", issapicrule, role='Process']:
     [ State_1121111111( a, c, k, h ) ] --> [ ]
  */
rule (modulo E) p_0_1121112[color=#ffffff, process="0",
                            issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_1121112( a.1, c.1, h.3 ) ] --> [ ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) p_0_1121112[color=#ffffff, process="0",
                               issapicrule, role='Process']:
     [ State_1121112( a, c, h ) ] --> [ ]
  */
rule (modulo E) p_0_112112[color=#ffffff, process="0",
                           issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_112112( a.1, c.1, h.3 ) ] --> [ ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) p_0_112112[color=#ffffff, process="0",
                              issapicrule, role='Process']:
     [ State_112112( a, c, h ) ] --> [ ]
  */
rule (modulo E) p_0_11212[color=#ffffff, process="0",
                          issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_11212( c.1, h.3 ) ] --> [ ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) p_0_11212[color=#ffffff, process="0",
                             issapicrule, role='Process']:
     [ State_11212( c, h ) ] --> [ ]
  */
rule (modulo E) inhh_0_12[color=#ffffff,
                          process="in(<h1.1, h2.1>);", issapicrule,
                          role='Process']:
   [ State_12( ), In( <h1.1, h2.1> ) ]
  -->
   [ State_121( h1.1, h2.1 ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) inhh_0_12[color=#ffffff,
                             process="in(<h1.1, h2.1>);", issapicrule,
                             role='Process']:
     [ State_12( ), In( <h1, h2> ) ]
    -->
     [ State_121( h1, h2 ) ]
  */
rule (modulo E) lookupatthasa_0_121[color=#ffffff,
                                    process="lookup <'att', h1.1> as a1.1",
                                    no_derivcheck, issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_121( h1.1, h2.1 ) ]
  --[ IsIn( <'att', h1.1>, a1.1 ) ]->
   [ State_1211( a1.1, h1.1, h2.1 ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) lookupatthasa_0_121[color=#ffffff,
                                       process="lookup <'att', h1.1> as a1.1",
                                       no_derivcheck, issapicrule, role='Process']:
     [ State_121( h1, h2 ) ]
    --[ IsIn( <'att', h1>, a1 ) ]->
     [ State_1211( a1, h1, h2 ) ]
  */
rule (modulo E) lookupatthasa_1_121[color=#ffffff,
                                    process="lookup <'att', h1.1> as a1.1",
                                    no_derivcheck, issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_121( h1.1, h2.1 ) ]
  --[ IsNotSet( <'att', h1.1> ) ]->
   [ State_1212( h1.1, h2.1 ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) lookupatthasa_1_121[color=#ffffff,
                                       process="lookup <'att', h1.1> as a1.1",
                                       no_derivcheck, issapicrule, role='Process']:
     [ State_121( h1, h2 ) ]
    --[ IsNotSet( <'att', h1> ) ]->
     [ State_1212( h1, h2 ) ]
  */
rule (modulo E) ifawrap_0_1211[color=#ffffff,
                               process="if a1.1='wrap'", issapicrule,
                               role='Process']:
   [ State_1211( a1.1, h1.1, h2.1 ) ]
  --[ Pred_Eq( a1.1, 'wrap' ) ]->
   [ State_12111( a1.1, h1.1, h2.1 ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) ifawrap_0_1211[color=#ffffff,
                                  process="if a1.1='wrap'", issapicrule,
                                  role='Process']:
     [ State_1211( a1, h1, h2 ) ]
    --[ Pred_Eq( a1, 'wrap' ) ]->
     [ State_12111( a1, h1, h2 ) ]
  */
rule (modulo E) ifawrap_1_1211[color=#ffffff,
                               process="if a1.1='wrap'", issapicrule,
                               role='Process']:
   [ State_1211( a1.1, h1.1, h2.1 ) ]
  --[ Pred_Not_Eq( a1.1, 'wrap' ) ]->
   [ State_12112( a1.1, h1.1, h2.1 ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) ifawrap_1_1211[color=#ffffff,
                                  process="if a1.1='wrap'", issapicrule,
                                  role='Process']:
     [ State_1211( a1, h1, h2 ) ]
    --[ Pred_Not_Eq( a1, 'wrap' ) ]->
     [ State_12112( a1, h1, h2 ) ]
  */
rule (modulo E) lookupkeyhask_0_12111[color=#ffffff,
                                      process="lookup <'key', h1.1> as k1.1",
                                      no_derivcheck, issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_12111( a1.1, h1.1, h2.1 ) ]
  --[ IsIn( <'key', h1.1>, k1.1 ) ]->
   [ State_121111( a1.1, h1.1, h2.1, k1.1 ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) lookupkeyhask_0_12111[color=#ffffff,
                                         process="lookup <'key', h1.1> as k1.1",
                                         no_derivcheck, issapicrule, role='Process']:
     [ State_12111( a1, h1, h2 ) ]
    --[ IsIn( <'key', h1>, k1 ) ]->
     [ State_121111( a1, h1, h2, k1 ) ]
  */
rule (modulo E) lookupkeyhask_1_12111[color=#ffffff,
                                      process="lookup <'key', h1.1> as k1.1",
                                      no_derivcheck, issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_12111( a1.1, h1.1, h2.1 ) ]
  --[ IsNotSet( <'key', h1.1> ) ]->
   [ State_121112( a1.1, h1.1, h2.1 ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) lookupkeyhask_1_12111[color=#ffffff,
                                         process="lookup <'key', h1.1> as k1.1",
                                         no_derivcheck, issapicrule, role='Process']:
     [ State_12111( a1, h1, h2 ) ]
    --[ IsNotSet( <'key', h1> ) ]->
     [ State_121112( a1, h1, h2 ) ]
  */
rule (modulo E) lookupkeyhask_0_121111[color=#ffffff,
                                       process="lookup <'key', h2.1> as k2.1",
                                       no_derivcheck, issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_121111( a1.1, h1.1, h2.1, k1.1 ) ]
  --[ IsIn( <'key', h2.1>, k2.1 ) ]->
   [ State_1211111( a1.1, h1.1, h2.1, k1.1, k2.1 ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) lookupkeyhask_0_121111[color=#ffffff,
                                          process="lookup <'key', h2.1> as k2.1",
                                          no_derivcheck, issapicrule, role='Process']:
     [ State_121111( a1, h1, h2, k1 ) ]
    --[ IsIn( <'key', h2>, k2 ) ]->
     [ State_1211111( a1, h1, h2, k1, k2 ) ]
  */
rule (modulo E) lookupkeyhask_1_121111[color=#ffffff,
                                       process="lookup <'key', h2.1> as k2.1",
                                       no_derivcheck, issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_121111( a1.1, h1.1, h2.1, k1.1 ) ]
  --[ IsNotSet( <'key', h2.1> ) ]->
   [ State_1211112( a1.1, h1.1, h2.1, k1.1 ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) lookupkeyhask_1_121111[color=#ffffff,
                                          process="lookup <'key', h2.1> as k2.1",
                                          no_derivcheck, issapicrule, role='Process']:
     [ State_121111( a1, h1, h2, k1 ) ]
    --[ IsNotSet( <'key', h2> ) ]->
     [ State_1211112( a1, h1, h2, k1 ) ]
  */
rule (modulo E) eventWrapkk_0_1211111[color=#ffffff,
                                      process="event Wrap( k1.1, k2.1 );", issapicrule,
                                      role='Process']:
   [ State_1211111( a1.1, h1.1, h2.1, k1.1, k2.1 ) ]
  --[ Wrap( k1.1, k2.1 ) ]->
   [ State_12111111( a1.1, h1.1, h2.1, k1.1, k2.1 ) ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) eventWrapkk_0_1211111[color=#ffffff,
                                         process="event Wrap( k1.1, k2.1 );", issapicrule,
                                         role='Process']:
     [ State_1211111( a1, h1, h2, k1, k2 ) ]
    --[ Wrap( k1, k2 ) ]->
     [ State_12111111( a1, h1, h2, k1, k2 ) ]
  */
rule (modulo E) outsenckk_0_12111111[color=#ffffff,
                                     process="out(senc(k2.1, k1.1));", issapicrule,
                                     role='Process']:
   [ State_12111111( a1.1, h1.1, h2.1, k1.1, k2.1 ) ]
  -->
   [
   State_121111111( a1.1, h1.1, h2.1, k1.1, k2.1 ),
   Out( senc(k2.1, k1.1) )
   ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) outsenckk_0_12111111[color=#ffffff,
                                        process="out(senc(k2.1, k1.1));", issapicrule,
                                        role='Process']:
     [ State_12111111( a1, h1, h2, k1, k2 ) ]
    -->
     [ State_121111111( a1, h1, h2, k1, k2 ), Out( senc(k2, k1) ) ]
  */
rule (modulo E) p_0_121111111[color=#ffffff, process="0",
                              issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_121111111( a1.1, h1.1, h2.1, k1.1, k2.1 ) ] --> [ ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) p_0_121111111[color=#ffffff,
                                 process="0", issapicrule, role='Process']:
     [ State_121111111( a1, h1, h2, k1, k2 ) ] --> [ ]
  */
rule (modulo E) p_0_1211112[color=#ffffff, process="0",
                            issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_1211112( a1.1, h1.1, h2.1, k1.1 ) ] --> [ ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) p_0_1211112[color=#ffffff, process="0",
                               issapicrule, role='Process']:
     [ State_1211112( a1, h1, h2, k1 ) ] --> [ ]
  */
rule (modulo E) p_0_121112[color=#ffffff, process="0",
                           issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_121112( a1.1, h1.1, h2.1 ) ] --> [ ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) p_0_121112[color=#ffffff, process="0",

     [ State_121112( a1, h1, h2 ) ] --> [ ]
  */
rule (modulo E) p_0_12112[color=#ffffff, process="0",
                          issapicrule, role='Process']:

                         issapicrule, role='Process']:
   [ State_1212( h1.1, h2.1 ) ] --> [ ]

  /*
  rule (modulo AC) p_0_1212[color=#ffffff, process="0",
                            issapicrule, role='Process']:
     [ State_1212( h1, h2 ) ] --> [ ]
  */


Restrictions of the Set of Traces


restriction True_is_true:
  "∀ x #i. (IsTrue( x ) @ #i) ⇒ (x = true)"
  // safety formula

  /*
  expanded formula:
  "∀ x #i. (IsTrue( x ) @ #i) ⇒ (x = true)"
  */

restriction set_in:
  "∀ x y #t3.
         (IsIn( x, y ) @ #t3) ⇒
         (∃ #t2.
           ((Insert( x, y ) @ #t2) ∧ (#t2 < #t3)) ∧
           (∀ #t1 yp.
             (Insert( x, yp ) @ #t1) ⇒
             (((#t1 < #t2) ∨ (#t1 = #t2)) ∨ (#t3 < #t1))))"

  /*
  expanded formula:
  "∀ x y #t3.
         (IsIn( x, y ) @ #t3) ⇒
         (∃ #t2.
           ((Insert( x, y ) @ #t2) ∧ (#t2 < #t3)) ∧
           (∀ #t1 yp.
             (Insert( x, yp ) @ #t1) ⇒
             (((#t1 < #t2) ∨ (#t1 = #t2)) ∨ (#t3 < #t1))))"
  */

restriction set_notin:
  "∀ x #t3.
         (IsNotSet( x ) @ #t3) ⇒
         (∀ #t1 y. (Insert( x, y ) @ #t1) ⇒ (#t3 < #t1))"
  // safety formula

  /*
  expanded formula:
  "∀ x #t3.
         (IsNotSet( x ) @ #t3) ⇒
         (∀ #t1 y. (Insert( x, y ) @ #t1) ⇒ (#t3 < #t1))"
  */

restriction predicate_eq:
  "∀ #i a b. (Pred_Eq( a, b ) @ #i) ⇒ (a = b)"
  // safety formula

  /*
  expanded formula:
  "∀ #i a b. (Pred_Eq( a, b ) @ #i) ⇒ (a = b)"
  */

restriction predicate_not_eq:
  "∀ #i a b. (Pred_Not_Eq( a, b ) @ #i) ⇒ (¬(a = b))"
  // safety formula

  /*
  expanded formula:
  "∀ #i a b. (Pred_Not_Eq( a, b ) @ #i) ⇒ (¬(a = b))"
  */

restriction single_session:
  "∀ #i #j. ((Init( ) @ #i) ∧ (Init( ) @ #j)) ⇒ (#i = #j)"
  // safety formula

  /*
  expanded formula:
  "∀ #i #j. ((Init( ) @ #i) ∧ (Init( ) @ #j)) ⇒ (#i = #j)"
  */

restriction locking_0:
  "∀ p pp l x lp #t1 #t3.
         ((Lock_0( p, l, x ) @ #t1) ∧ (Lock( pp, lp, x ) @ #t3)) ⇒
         ((((#t1 < #t3) ∧
            (∃ #t2.
              (((((Unlock_0( p, l, x ) @ #t2) ∧ (#t1 < #t2)) ∧
                 (#t2 < #t3)) ∧
                (∀ #t0 pp.1. (Unlock( pp.1, l, x ) @ #t0) ⇒ (#t0 = #t2))) ∧
               (∀ pp.1 lpp #t0.
                 (Lock( pp.1, lpp, x ) @ #t0) ⇒
                 (((#t0 < #t1) ∨ (#t0 = #t1)) ∨ (#t2 < #t0)))) ∧
              (∀ pp.1 lpp #t0.
                (Unlock( pp.1, lpp, x ) @ #t0) ⇒
                (((#t0 < #t1) ∨ (#t2 < #t0)) ∨ (#t2 = #t0))))) ∨
           (#t3 < #t1)) ∨
          (#t1 = #t3))"

  /*
  expanded formula:
  "∀ p pp l x lp #t1 #t3.
         ((Lock_0( p, l, x ) @ #t1) ∧ (Lock( pp, lp, x ) @ #t3)) ⇒
         ((((#t1 < #t3) ∧
            (∃ #t2.
              (((((Unlock_0( p, l, x ) @ #t2) ∧ (#t1 < #t2)) ∧
                 (#t2 < #t3)) ∧
                (∀ #t0 pp.1. (Unlock( pp.1, l, x ) @ #t0) ⇒ (#t0 = #t2))) ∧
               (∀ pp.1 lpp #t0.
                 (Lock( pp.1, lpp, x ) @ #t0) ⇒
                 (((#t0 < #t1) ∨ (#t0 = #t1)) ∨ (#t2 < #t0)))) ∧
              (∀ pp.1 lpp #t0.
                (Unlock( pp.1, lpp, x ) @ #t0) ⇒
                (((#t0 < #t1) ∨ (#t2 < #t0)) ∨ (#t2 = #t0))))) ∨
           (#t3 < #t1)) ∨
          (#t1 = #t3))"
  */
title: Multiset rewriting rules and restrictions
